body: Leo, great catching up with you at the Activate Summit last week — your comments on the panel about grid-scale storage timelines really stuck with me. I wanted to follow up on the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) conversation we started; we're tracking them closely at [Halfway Capital](firms/halfway-capital) and I think there's a real case for a co-investment structure given the capital intensity of their next round. Their team has been thoughtful about keeping burn lean while hitting the interconnection milestones, which is rare at this stage. Would love to get on a call this week to compare notes before their Series A process officially kicks off — I'd rather align early than find ourselves in a competitive dynamic. Let me know what your calendar looks like.
